sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, timestamp(3) with time zone '2021-12-01 10:15:30.456+01:00');
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = timestamp(3) with time zone '2022-01-10 09:00:00.123+00:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time > timestamp(3) with time zone '2021-01-01 00:00:00.000+00:00';
DELETE FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time < timestamp(3) with time zone '2020-01-01 00:00:00.000+00:00';
